tests.name: Register_WithValidEmail_CreatesUser
tests.description: Valid email and password should create a user
tests.assert: User created, returns success, welcome email queued

tests.name: Register_WithEmptyEmail_ReturnsValidationError
tests.description: Empty email should return validation error
tests.assert: Returns validation error, user not created

tests.name: Register_WithInvalidEmailFormat_ReturnsValidationError
tests.description: Invalid email format should return validation error
tests.assert: Returns validation error, user not created
